converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Jacob Herbert Bruckner papers
Bruckner, Jacob Herbert, 1905-1970.
21-31-1326
12 cubic feet. 12 cubic feet.
1938-1968. Movie film, film strips, slides, patents, professional journals, and correspondence. Includes material on animal and poultry societies. Collection material in English 2072168
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. Swann
Date completed:
May 1970
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, Decemeber 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
J. Herbert Bruckner was a professor of poultry science at the Cornell University College of Agriculture, and was chairman of the department from 1940-1965.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes material on animal and poultry societies; professional organizations; faculty, students, and various committees at Cornell University; movie film, film strips, and slides; patents; professional journals; and correspondence.
Cite As:
Jacob Herbert Bruckner papers, #21-31-1326. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Slides (photographs). Patents (license). Motion pictures. Poultry -- Study and teaching. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences
